title: Simple TexturePack-Mekanism
description: The Mod"Mekanism" 's expansion pack for Simple TexturePack
body:
This is a SimpleTexturePack-_Mekanism_ Mod Extension

It brings vibrant textures to your Mekanism machine factory,Has a wide range of version support，Some blocks and items have been optimized。



How To Use：

Start Minecraft,Press ESC, Options>Resource Packs>Open Pack Folder and copies the ".zip"flie to here,click the pack in "Available"Area and click Done,after a Loading interface，then you finished it

Notice:

1.The version before 1.15 will **NOT** supported,so the newly texture only update on the“1.15-1.20MainVersion”

2.The Extension must on the top of Main
Example:![This is right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728b1fb53a170b39f5c3e0573310966a76c97e5f.png)

3.This Pack include Mod:Mekanism,Mekanism Generators,Mekanism Tools.

4.!To use the texture pack,you **must** install the mod "_Mekanism_" and the Main pack first!!

   To install the Main pack,please visit:[CLICK HERE!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-texturepack)

   To install Mod:Mekanism,please visit:[CLICK HERE!](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
